content: For React+Express monorepos on free hosting: Render is the best free option with render.yaml blueprints. Single-service approach (Express serves React dist) is simpler and uses fewer resources. Railway auto-detects services but has less free tier. Key pattern: build React to client/dist, Express serves it with express.static, catch-all route for SPA routing. PORT must come from process.env. Free tiers spin down after 15min inactivity (cold starts). Health check endpoint needed.
